title: Uruguayan-Style Stewed Turkey Neck
description: A hearty, comforting stew originating from Uruguay, made with tender turkey neck and rich vegetables.

ingredients.name: Turkey neck
ingredients.notes: ask your butcher to cut into 2-inch pieces

instructions: Brown the bacon in a large Dutch oven over medium heat. Remove the cooked bacon and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrot and potato, cook for 5 minutes.
Add the turkey neck pieces to the pot and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Return the cooked bacon to the pot, add the chicken broth, and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 2 hours, or until the turkey neck is tender and falls off the bone.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
